series_metadata.series_description: File contains campaign, program, sales, and retail support artwork assets, created for Marketing on different print media (e.g., cling, poster, sticker, HTP, headers, print work for tickets/draws, video files, audio files, removable drives.)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: hard copy in operating area , review administrative value, if none ; Electronic: digital copy in operating area , review administrative value, if none
